chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitution Petition No. D- 5125 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For order on Misc. No. 21409/2025. (U/A) 2. For order on Misc. No. 21410/2025. (Exp/A) 3. For order on Misc. No. 21411/2025. (Stay/A) 4. For hearing of main case. 22.10.2025 Mr. Abdul Rahim Lakhani, advocate along with Mr. Atta Muhammad Qureshi, advocate for applicant. 1. Granted. 2,3,4. Under instructions, learned counsel does not press this petition and states he shall seek appropriate recourse as may be permissible under the law. In view hereof, petition is dismissed as withdrawn with pending applications. Judge Judge Ayaz p.s.
